Friday

Friday Original Paddle

Budget-friendly, forgiving starter paddle designed to make upgrading less expensive.

Best for new players who need a forgiving carbon-style paddle and would rather invest savings into lessons or court time.

TypeValue
Shapehybrid
CorePolymer thermoformed starter platform
FaceCarbon fiber style surface
Reference price$69.00
Price noteOfficial Friday pricing/bundle offers vary; verify current checkout price
Level2.0, 2.5, 3.0, 3.5
TraitsValue, Forgiveness, Control
Used by / lineRecreational and improving players
Official product page

Prices, sponsors, rankings, DUPR, and product availability change. Verify on the linked official source before publishing buying advice.

Prices, specs, and approved-equipment status can change. Treat this as a research dashboard and verify official retailer and equipment-list pages before purchase.

Play profile

Power7.0
Control8.0
Spin7.8
Forgiveness8.7
Hand speed8.1

Scores are editorial comparison notes based on product positioning and common review signals; they are not lab measurements.

How the Original Paddle plays

The Friday Original Paddle is a value-focused paddle. On our 0–10 comparison scale its strongest traits are forgiveness and hand speed. Its hybrid shape balances reach with a usable sweet spot.

It is aimed at 2.0–3.5 players, and it is forgiving enough for improvers still grooving their swing. It favours touch over raw put-away power. It sits in the budget price tier — confirm the current price at the source before buying. It is part of the Recreational and improving players.
